name: WeStock Data
examples_zh: 查询贵州茅台近一年日K线、成交量和MACD指标，并列出最近三次放量上涨日期
对比腾讯控股、阿里巴巴和Apple最近四个季度的利润表、资产负债表和现金流指标
查看沪深300ETF的持仓明细、最新净值和近30日资金流向
examples_en: Query Kweichow Moutai's daily K-line, volume, and MACD for the past year, then list the last three high-volume up days
Compare Tencent Holdings, Alibaba, and Apple across the latest four quarters of income statement, balance sheet, and cash-flow metrics
Show holdings, latest NAV, and 30-day capital flow for a CSI 300 ETF
